From Our Reserve

Our Products

Chaunsa Mango 🍍

Golden & Fragrant

  • Rich in Vitamin C – boosts immunity & enhances skin glow
  • High in Vitamin A – supports eye health
  • Loaded with antioxidants – fights oxidative stress
  • Naturally very sweet & juicy – satisfies sugar cravings
  • High water content – keeps you cool & hydrated
  • Fiber-rich – supports smooth digestion
  • Provides quick natural energy boost
  • Known for its aroma & flavor – uplifting and refreshing
  • Helps maintain overall summer wellness

Premium Langra Mango 🍍

Rich & Juicy

  • Rich in Vitamin C – supports immunity & healthy skin
  • Good source of Vitamin A – helps improve vision
  • Antioxidants – protects against damage & boosts health
  • High in dietary fiber – aids digestion & gut health
  • Naturally hydrating – perfect for summer heat
  • Fiberless, smooth pulp – easy and enjoyable to eat
  • Balanced sweet-tangy flavor – not overly sugary
  • Provides quick natural energy
  • Supports overall well-being with every bite
★ Our Star Product ★

Miyazaki Mango 🍍

The Rarest of All

  • Carbide-free & strictly organically grown
  • Cultivated with utmost care and precision
  • Extremely sweet with a rich, indulgent flavor
  • Fiberless pulp – smooth, melt-in-mouth experience
  • Luxurious honey-like texture and aroma
  • Handpicked and carefully handled to preserve quality
  • Naturally ripened for pure, authentic taste
  • A rare, premium mango experience unlike any other

The Hearts Behind the Reserve

Minds Behind the Reserve

We are the three daughters behind RAVI Miyazaki Reserve.

This was never just a farm.
Our father planted it for her — our mother, Ravi Prabha,
who dreamed of growing the finest mangoes.

We didn't create this.
We continued it. — Her daughters
